examples: I found it difficult to shake off a sense of social inferiority.
The enemy forces were reduced to absolute inferiority.
Working-class people seem slowly to be losing the feeling of inferiority they had in the past.
This relational inferiority may follow a worker throughout her career, sabotaging chances of true organizational power.
The Chevy Trailblazer and GMC Envoy are now competitive with Ford's Explorer, after years of inferiority.
